title: Pinocchio development
summary: Comprehensive guide for building high-performance Solana programs using Pinocchio - the zero-dependency, zero-copy framework.
author: sendaifun

landingGuidance.title: Performance Benchmarks (2025)
landingGuidance.content:
Latest benchmarks demonstrate Pinocchio's efficiency:

| Program | Anchor CU | Pinocchio CU | Reduction |
|---------|-----------|--------------|-----------|
| Token Transfer | ~6,000 | ~600-800 | **88-95%** |
| Memo Program | ~650 | ~108 | **83%** |
| Counter | ~800 | ~104 | **87%** |

*Assembly implementation: 104 CU, Pinocchio: 108 CU, Basic Anchor: 649 CU*

failureHandling.title: Fallback handling
failureHandling.content:
- Validate signer assumptions, addresses, and environment variables before retrying.
- Simulate or use read-only verification paths before broadcasting changed transactions.
- Escalate to the protocol's troubleshooting docs when behavior differs from the expected flow.
